subject: [PATCH v5 5/7] locking: Add contended_release tracepoint to qspinlock

reviews.author: Paul E. McKenney
reviews.summary: Approved the patch, acknowledging that it's a nice split out of functionality.

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds a contended_release tracepoint to the qspinlock implementation, allowing for tracing of lock contention events. The tracepoint is implemented using the arch-overridable queued_spin_release() function, which ensures correct behavior across all architectures. The patch also includes changes to the hot path to minimize performance impact and provides binary size estimates.
